_note: Idle timeout scenario. Session starts, two tool events fire, then no further events arrive. checkIdle() fires at 09:08 (5-minute timer). Finds now - lastActivity >= 300s. Clears session: isActive → false, sessionId cleared.

No further events. lastActivity = 09:03:00Z. checkIdle() fires at 09:08:00Z (300s after last activity). Expected post-timeout state: isActive=false, utilization preserved from last API response, resetsAt unchanged.
